query:
SELECT 'cre_assets' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM cre_assets WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%sprint%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%seed%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'deals', COUNT(*) FROM deals WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%sprint%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%seed%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'macro_signals', COUNT(*) FROM macro_signals WHERE title LIKE '%Sprint%' OR title LIKE '%sprint%' OR title LIKE '%Test%' OR title LIKE '%seed%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'opportunities', COUNT(*) FROM opportunities WHERE name LIKE '%Sprint%' OR name LIKE '%sprint%' OR name LIKE '%Test%' OR name LIKE '%seed%'
